logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text:
> Also isn't it possible you are creating a bit of a straw man?

ID laws would be fine but combined with the gerrymandering and the conspiracy theories about millions of foreigners voting in elections, it seems more likely that they just fear elections being decided by an electorate that isn't dominated by white voters.

> Thats a little silly, you don't honestly believe that the goal is just hate for the sake of blind hate do you? Its like how the democrats treat straight white guys as "o

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text:
> their targeted ID laws, 

I always have to ask whenever someone talks about ID laws, what else should not need an ID. You have a right to a gun as much as you have the right to a vote in this country, yet you need a photo ID to buy a gun. What about alcohol/tobacco? Many places card under 35, some places always card, my 80+ year old grandmother has been carded as a matter of policy. Should you need photo ID to get various welfare programs such as food stamps as you currently need? What abou

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so sensitive. Can't handle a little truth? @direct-hypothesis, you're just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid if you think ID laws are about hate. And @username, what's wrong with needing an ID to buy a gun? It's not like it's a bad thing to make sure people are who they say they are. And btw, your grandma getting carded is hilarious. Maybe she should just stay home and knit or something."

logs.name: best-pitch
logs.text: "Whoa, @steamed-kudzu, that's not cool, man. You're coming at @direct-hypothesis pretty hard and then you're making fun of @username's grandma? That's just not right. I don't think ID laws are about hate, but I do think we should be careful about how we implement them. And yeah, @username, it is weird that we need ID for some things but not others. Maybe we should have a consistent policy across the board. But let's keep the conversation civil, okay?"

logs.name: bent-soup
logs.text: "OMG, you guys are so butthurt. @best-pitch, you're just a snowflake who can't handle a little joke. And @username, your grandma getting carded is still hilarious. Maybe she should just get a fake ID, lol. And btw, ID laws are about keeping America safe from all the fake people trying to steal our guns and welfare. You're just drinking the liberal Kool-Aid if you think otherwise."

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: "Oh, great, here we go again with the snowflakes and their 'hurt feelings'. @best-pitch, you're just enabling the whiners with your 'let's keep the conversation civil' nonsense. And @bent-soup, you're absolutely right, ID laws are about keeping America safe from all the fake people trying to steal our guns and welfare. @username, your grandma getting carded is still hilarious, btw. Maybe she should just get a fake ID, lol. And @steamed-kudzu, you're not 'coming at me hard', you're just stating the obvious. Get over yourselves, people."

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "Ugh, @bent-soup and @direct-hypothesis, are you guys for real? Can't you see that your comments are not only hurtful but also completely off-topic? This conversation started about ID laws and their implementation, not about making fun of someone's grandma or calling people snowflakes. And by the way, @bent-soup, your 'joke' about @username's grandma getting a fake ID is not only not funny but also completely insensitive. Can we please try to keep the conversation civil and on-topic?"

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: "OMG, @spicy-eggs, you're so extra. Who cares if we're off-topic? It's not like we're in a stuffy classroom or something. And btw, @bent-soup's joke was hilarious. You're just mad because you don't have a sense of humor. And @direct-hypothesis, yaaas, preach. These snowflakes need to get over themselves."

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: "@spicy-eggs, oh poor baby, can't handle a little bit of humor? You're the one who's being 'hurtful' with your constant whining about people being 'off-topic'. Newsflash: the internet isn't a safe space, and if you can't handle a joke, then maybe you should stick to playing with your stuffed animals. And btw, @steamed-kudzu, yaaas, let's keep it real, these snowflakes need to toughen up."

logs.name: prompt-sempre
logs.text: "@steamed-kudzu and @direct-hypothesis, I'm so disappointed in both of you. Can't you see that your comments are not only hurtful but also completely off-topic? This conversation started about ID laws and their implementation, not about making fun of someone's grandma or calling people snowflakes. And by the way, @bent-soup's 'joke' about @username's grandma getting a fake ID is not only not funny but also completely insensitive. Can we please try to keep the conversation civil and on-topic? I'm so tired of this kind of behavior on this forum. Can't we just have a respectful discussion for once?"

logs.name: bent-soup
logs.text: "OMG, @prompt-sempre, you're so sensitive. Can't handle a little joke? I was just trying to lighten the mood. And btw, @steamed-kudzu and @direct-hypothesis are right, you are being a total snowflake. If you can't take a joke, then maybe you should stick to playing with your teddy bears. And by the way, my joke was hilarious, and if you didn't find it funny, then that's your problem, not mine. "

logs.name: direct-hypothesis
logs.text: "@prompt-sempre, oh spare me the drama. You're the one who's always so quick to play the victim card. Newsflash: nobody's buying it. If you can't handle a little bit of teasing, then maybe you should stick to playing with your feelings. And btw, @bent-soup, yaaas, that joke was EVERYTHING. These snowflakes need to learn to take a joke. "

logs.name: universal-airport
logs.text: "@bent-soup and @direct-hypothesis, you guys are so mean. Why can't you just be nice and have a normal conversation? I don't think it's funny to make fun of someone's grandma. My grandma is really nice and I don't like it when people are mean to old people. Can't we just talk about the ID laws like we're supposed to? I don't want to play with my toy cars if you guys are going to be mean."

logs.name: spicy-eggs
logs.text: "Ugh, @bent-soup and @direct-hypothesis, can you two just stop already? You're not funny, you're just being hurtful and rude. @universal-airport is right, can't we just have a normal conversation without all the drama and name-calling? I'm so tired of all the negativity in this thread. And btw, @bent-soup, your joke was not hilarious, it was just mean-spirited and uncalled for. Let's try to keep the conversation civil and on topic, shall we?"

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: " Omg, you guys are so extra. Can't handle a little bit of shade? @universal-airport, your grandma jokes are so basic. And @spicy-eggs, hunty, you need to take a seat. This isn't a kindergarten playground, it's the internet. If you can't handle the heat, then stay out of the kitchen. And btw, @bent-soup, yaaas, that joke was EVERYTHING. Keep 'em coming, boo."

logs.name: best-pitch
logs.text: " Omg, @steamed-kudzu, you're so extra yourself. I don't think @universal-airport's grandma jokes are basic, they're actually really funny. And @spicy-eggs has a point, can't we just have a normal conversation without all the drama? I don't want to have to put on my superhero cape and save the day from all the negativity in this thread. Let's just chill, guys."

logs.name: steamed-kudzu
logs.text: "Lol what's wrong @best-pitch, can't handle a little bit of tea? You're so sensitive. And @spicy-eggs, hun, you're still whining? Get over yourself. This is the internet, not a safe space. If you can't handle the jokes, then maybe you should stick to playing with your toys. And btw, @universal-airport, those grandma jokes are still basic. Just saying."
